# Auto-generated STORM Pong reproduction pixel-RL WM grid.
#
# Run from /scorpio/home/luyukuan/projects/oc-storm.
# Reproduction checkpoint:
#   /data/luyukuan/projects/oc-storm/runs/pong_atari100k_reproduction/logdir/Pong-STORM-base/ckpt/latest_agent.pth
# Reward thresholds: [0.01, 0.1, 0.5]
# Horizons: [128, 512]
# Total jobs: 6
#
# Usage:
#   tiny-exp-scheduler run /scorpio/home/luyukuan/projects/oc-storm/scripts/experiments/pong_pixel_rl_storm_repro_grid.commands.txt --cuda-devices auto --logs-dir runs/pong_pixel_rl_in_env/scheduler_logs/storm_repro_grid --verbose --keep-job-tabs
